The key part here is the description of the father's reaction. The father's expression made the narrator realize he was telling the truth. Then it says that the father was home all day, searching for jobs. Also, the father asked the kids to spend less money, and he was trying to be optimistic. However, it's mentioned that the father's unemployment affected his self-esteem. So the question is about the father's emotional reaction. The options are: (A) was angry with his boss, (B) didn't care about it at all, (C) couldn't accept the fact easily, (D) was as happy as usual.
